---
title: "testing_document"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(svglite)
library(r2d3)
library(tibble)
library(jsonlite)
library(youdrawitR)

```

```{r}
data = tibble(x = seq(1, 25, .5), 
              y = exp((x-15)/30),
              ypoints = exp(((x-15)/30) + rnorm(30, 0, 0.1)))
data$Group <- sample(c("Group_1", "Group_2", "Group_3"),
                     size = nrow(data),
                     replace = TRUE)
```

```{r}
ggplot(data, aes(x, ypoints)) +
  geom_point(size = 2, colour = "magenta") +
  labs(x = "X-Label", y = "Y-Label")
```

```{r}
ggplot(data, aes(x, ypoints)) +
  geom_point(size = 2, colour = "magenta") +
  labs(x = "X-Label", y = "Y-Label")
```

```{r}

data
summary(data)


(ggplot(data, aes(x, ypoints)) +
  geom_point(data = data %>% mutate(ypoints2 = ifelse(x <= 10, ypoints, NA)),
             aes(y = ypoints2),
             size = 2, 
             colour = "magenta"
             ) +
  geom_line(data = data, aes(x = x, y = y)) +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 20)) +
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 2)) +
  labs(x = "X-Label", y = "Y-Label")) |>
  sketchit()

# why is this happening?
```

```{r}
library(dplyr)

df <- full_join(points, mtcars, by = c("x" = "wt"))
df
```

```{r}
df
```

```{r, warning=FALSE}
ggplot(data = df)+
  geom_line(aes(x = x, y = y)) +
  geom_point(aes(x = x, y = mpg))
```

```{r}
ggplot(data = df)+
  geom_line(aes(x = x, y = y)) +
  geom_point(aes(x = x, y = mpg))
```
